heroSection.heading: Get in Touch
heroSection.subheading: We're here to answer your questions and connect you with our team

address.streetAddress: Makerere University Campus, College of Computing and Information Sciences
address.fullAddress:
African Center of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data-Intensive Sciences
College of Computing and Information Sciences
Makerere University
P.O. Box 7062, Kampala, Uganda

officeHours.holidayNote: Closed on Sundays and public holidays
officeHours.additionalInfo: For urgent matters outside office hours, please email us and we will respond as soon as possible.

mapInfo.directionsText:
From Kampala city center, take Bombo Road heading north. Turn right at the Makerere University Main Gate. Proceed to the College of Computing and Information Sciences. The ACE building is located within the college premises.

Public transport: Take any taxi or bus heading to Makerere University. Ask for the College of Computing (CoCS) or ACE building.

formSettings.formDescription: Have a question or inquiry? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24-48 hours.
formSettings.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We have received your inquiry and will respond within 24-48 hours.

additionalInfo.parkingInfo: Visitor parking is available at the main university parking lot near the College of Computing. Please obtain a visitor's pass at the main gate.
additionalInfo.accessibilityInfo: The ACE building is wheelchair accessible with ramps and elevators. Accessible restrooms are available on each floor.
additionalInfo.visitorsNote: Visitors are welcome during office hours. Please check in at the reception desk on the ground floor. For scheduled meetings, please arrive 10 minutes early.
